overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district in Night City during the blue hour. The character progresses along a sidewalk past holographic billboards, elevated highways, and dense urban architecture toward a prominent tower with orange signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the large DYNALAR billboard and neon storefronts

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying a monochrome hand image with DYNALAR text
elevated multi-lane highway with glass and concrete supports
row of commercial entrances with glowing cyan and purple neon accents
overhead orange signage with DARRA text spanning the street
tall palm trees lining the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a futuristic commercial sidewalk with the large DYNALAR billboard prominent on the left. The elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right, with moderate traffic and pedestrians sharing the space. Neon storefronts line the left side while the DARRA sign hangs visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor under overhead signage

events.description: entering zone with prominent green neon strip lighting illuminating the left building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor beneath the DARRA overhead sign, passing digital vending machines

entered.detail: continuous horizontal green neon lighting running along the building edge
futuristic automated kiosk with glowing interface panels

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the DARRA overhead sign into a section dominated by green neon lighting. The DYNALAR billboard falls behind as the corridor continues with digital vending machines on the right and consistent pedestrian traffic. The elevated highway remains visible to the right while the CALIENTE tower first appears in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone approaching the Caliente tower with traffic interaction

events.description: camera briefly turns right to observe passing futuristic vehicles and traffic on the multi-lane road
CALIENTE tower with orange neon signage becomes the dominant focal landmark ahead

agents.ego_description: walking forward while glancing at passing traffic, observing the urban environment

notable_agents.action: woman in light blue top and yellow pants walking past the camera toward the background

entered.detail: tall building with large orange CALIENTE signage at the top, becoming the focal point
vertical signage with WILD BLUE text on the right side of the street
metal bollards and railings separating the sidewalk from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the CALIENTE tower emerges ahead as the primary destination. The camera briefly turns to observe traffic passing on the right, where a woman in a blue top walks past. The WILD BLUE sign becomes visible on the right while the elevated highway structure recedes slightly into the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the Caliente casino complex with Softsys signage

events.description: passing the tiered concrete stairs structure on the left side of the walkway
lighting shifts to warm orange glow from the prominent CALIENTE signage and green neon from SOFTSYS

agents.ego_description: approaching the CALIENTE tower base, navigating past pedestrians and stairs

entered.detail: large green neon signage with SOFTSYS text on the building facade
wide concrete staircase with multiple levels leading up to building entrance
elevated walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street ahead
vertical display column showing rotating holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the CALIENTE tower, passing tiered concrete stairs on the left and entering an area dominated by orange and green neon signage. The SOFTSYS sign becomes prominent on the left while a pedestrian overpass becomes visible ahead. The elevated highway and earlier neon strips fall behind as the environment becomes denser with commercial signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic commercial sidewalk that transitions from a blue-toned neon corridor into a dense urban hub dominated by orange signage. It begins with the character walking past a large DYNALAR billboard and an elevated highway, moving toward a distant DARRA sign. As the character passes under that sign, the environment shifts into a section saturated with green neon lighting and digital vending machines, while the CALIENTE tower first emerges on the horizon. The scene then opens up as the camera briefly observes passing traffic and a woman in a blue top, passing the WILD BLUE sign as the highway structure recedes into the mid-ground. Finally, the camera approaches the base of the CALIENTE tower, moving past tiered concrete stairs and the SOFTSYS sign into a dense cluster of orange and green neon lights beneath a pedestrian overpass.
